text:
Created attachment 156326
shar with new port www/rubygem-newrelic_rpm

While working at the gitlab-port, i figured out the need of this port.

In this port i had to use a pkg-plist. It installs something in /usr/local/bin and this seems not to be handled by RUBY_AUTOPLIST.

SHAR attached. :)
